items.product_name: Enjoy Up to 8% APR with RLUSD Flexible Products
items.reward_label: Fellow Binancians, Binance Earn is excited to launch a new campaign for the RLUSD Simple Earn Flexible Products !  During the Promotion Period, users who subscribe to RLUSD Flexible Products may enjoy up to 8% APR, which includes an exclusive Bonus Tiered APR on top of Real-Time APR rewards.  How to Participate: Promotion Period: 2026-03-13 00:00:00 (UTC) to 2026-03-26 23:59:59 (UTC) Subscription Format: Complete subscription on a first-come, first-served basis in accordance with the terms below. Rewards Distribution: Bonus Tiered APR: Distributed to users’ Spot Accounts on a daily basis.

items.product_name: Share 10 Million SHELL Rewards and Enjoy Up to 1.5% APR with ETH Flexible Products!
items.reward_label: All eligible ETH holders who make new subscriptions to ETH Flexible Products during the Promotion Period will have a chance to share 10 millions SHELL rewards .  In addition, eligible users who subscribe to ETH Flexible Products can enjoy up to 1.5% APR , which includes an exclusive 0.1% Bonus Tiered APR on top of the Real-Time APR rewards.  Promotion A: Binance Earn Monthly Leaderboard - Subscribe to ETH Flexible Products to Share 10 Million SHELL Rewards Promotion Period: 2026-03-11 00:00 (UTC) to 2026-04-09 23:59 (UTC) All users who confirm their participation and make new net subscriptions* to ETH Flexible Products with at least 0.2 ETH during the Promotion Period can participate in Promotion A.  Eligible users will then be ranked by ETH Score** during the Promotion Period. Eligible participants will qualify to share 10 million SHELL rewards , where the top user can receive 600,000 SHELL , as per the table below.
